title: CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER OF CLATSKANIE CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 401 SW Bel Air Drive Clatskanie, OR 97016 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (503) 728-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 728-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs Nutrition Education * Diabetes Nutrition Education * People with Chronic Illnesses Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
